name: convention enforcement: every shipped terraform convention rule is grounded in a catalog source
command: ruby -ryaml -e 'Encoding.default_external=Encoding::UTF_8; r=ENV["CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT"]; rules=YAML.unsafe_load_file(r+"/standards/cloud-conventions/terraform.yaml"); ids={}; [r+"/standards/cloud-architecture-sources.yaml", r+"/standards/cloud-engineering-sources.yaml"].each{|f| YAML.unsafe_load_file(f).each{|e| ids[e["id"]]=true}}; bad=rules.reject{|x| ids[x["source_id"]]}; exit(bad.empty? ? 0 : 1)' && echo all-grounded 1>&2
